name: Pitfall!
description: Pitfall! is a side-scrolling platform adventure game where the player controls Pitfall Harry through a jungle environment. The environment consists of a continuous series of interconnected screens that scroll horizontally as Harry moves. The primary goal is to collect all the treasures (diamonds, bags of money, and gold bars) within a 20-minute time limit, while avoiding various hazards. These hazards include bottomless pits, quicksand, rolling logs, campfires, scorpions, snakes, and crocodiles. Harry can swing on vines to cross large gaps and can jump over smaller obstacles and enemies. The player must carefully time their jumps and swings to avoid falling into pits or colliding with dangerous creatures. There are also underground tunnels that provide shortcuts through the jungle but also present their own set of challenges, such as navigating through narrow passages and avoiding more enemies. The score increases when treasures are obtained. The game ends when the timer expires, or when Harry dies.

controls.arrow_up: Swing on a vine (when close to a vine)
controls.arrow_down: Crouch (used to avoid certain enemies or enter tunnels, if positioned above a tunnel entrance)
